name: bytes
title: bytes
description: The corresponding CAPL type for the bytes type in vCDL. Reading and writing is done via memcpy overloads. The length of a bytes value can be determined with the elCount operator.
This type is not available for user declarations.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
